text: Imagine scaling your operations by 500,000 people in one month.
That's what we had to pull off at Instacart during COVID.
Our operations teams were overwhelmed with this challenge.
And given their limited resources and tools, we knew they must be a better way.
So we left Instacart and raised $8 million to build Champ AI
so operations teams would never have to scale manually again.
Here's the problem with operations at scale.
Every step in growth introduces new requirements and new operational complexity.
Anything with clean APIs and structured data gets automated fast.
But the work that lives between the tools, reading messy documents,
navigating government models for tax and compliance, calling insurance companies,
that work has stayed manual. Until now.
Champ is an AI agent's platform that turns your manual processes into software.
Here's how it works. You upload an SOP, Champ automates the rest.
Browser agents navigate portals, document agents read and extract, voice agents make calls.
All orchestrated together, not stitched from three different vendors.
When an agent needs your input, it notifies your team, so you stay in control.
Today, we're working with many mission-critical industries, such as healthcare and logistics,
automating their most complex operations.
Visit champ.ai and get your first workflow automated for free.
